mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM B_BOARD ORDER BY POST_ID DESC
SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM B_BOARD WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO B_BOARD ( POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( B_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{contents}, #{writer}, 0, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE B_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, WRITER = #{writer}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
